ddls:
CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "percentile" INTEGER /* Percentile rank of the review statistics */,
  "reviews_given" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews given */,
  "scores_given" INTEGER /* Total number of scores given */,
  "usefulness_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of useful reviews to total reviews */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score given by users */,
  "stddev_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of scores given */,
  "average_review_score" REAL /* Average review score */,
  "stddev_review_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of review scores */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "review_period" TEXT /* Period for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating potential anomalies in the review data */,
  "anomaly_reason" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomaly */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the product */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases for the product */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the product */,
  "stddev_rating" REAL /* Standard deviation of ratings for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the user has given */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "review_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the user's reviews */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is verified */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., regular, power user, influencer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user */,
  "useful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was left */,
  "review_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the review based on helpfulness and rating */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is featured */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "total_products" INTEGER /* Total number of products in the category */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for products in the category */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases for products in the category */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for products in the category */,
  "stddev_rating" REAL /* Standard deviation of ratings for products in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the score given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usefulness_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usefulness vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "is_useful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user found the review useful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usefulness_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usefulness_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_scores" (
  "review_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review score */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the score given to the review content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product view */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the product */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the product */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating given */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was left */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
